message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker for timer wheel, cancellation, trace persistence, and test infrastructure work

Syncs issue statuses to reflect progress across multiple subsystems:
- Timer wheel (bd-2cw.4) moved to implementation phase now that the
  flat-arena walking skeleton replaces the previous stub
- Cancellation protocol (bd-2cw.3) updated to reflect scheduler
  integration with budget enforcement and origin attribution
- Binary trace persistence (bd-2n0.5) marked in-progress with
  export/import/continuity-check API landed
- Conformance epic (bd-1md) children updated: differential fuzz
  harness (bd-1md.3), counterexample minimizer (bd-1md.4),
  performance benchmarks (bd-1md.6), structured test logging
  (bd-1md.11), and API documentation coverage gate (bd-hwb.16)
  all show forward progress
- Vertical fixture families (automotive watchdog, HFT microburst)
  and robustness test suites reflected in status changes

These status updates keep the beads issue graph consistent with
the actual implementation state so that downstream tooling (dsr
quality gates, traceability index) can accurately report coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
